project.name: Baton
project.purpose: Provide a concise repository-local control plane for teams of AI agents.
users: Teams coordinating AI agents in a repository
project.outcome: Make authority, readiness, execution, and evidence explicit without owning the Repository.
nonGoals: Publish outside the selected Clearance Protocol

baton.action: Define the next Goal and Ticket
baton.returnTrigger: A bounded Ready Ticket is recorded
